Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Defendants Requests For Production Nos. 18, 36 And 47 (Part 2 Of 2 For Purposes Of Entry Of Tentative Ruling)
Off Calendar Aug-13-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Defendants Requests For Production Nos. 18, 36 And 47
Off Calendar Aug-13-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT KASOWITZ BENSON TORRES LLP's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Defendants Requests For Production Nos. 18, 36 And 47.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

AS TO DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION NOS 18, 36 AND 47 THE COURT ISSUES THE FOLLOWING ORDER:
(1) PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTIONS TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION NO. 18 ARE OVERRULED. WITHIN FIFTEEN (15) DAY FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER WILL SERVE DEFENDANT WITH A VERIFIED CODE COMPLIANT RESPONSE TO SAID REQUEST AND COPIES ALL RESPONSIVE DOCUMENNTS.
(2) PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTIONS TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION NO. 36 ARE OVERRULED. WITNIN FIFTEEN (15) FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER PLAINTIFF WILL SERVE DEFENDANT WITH A VERIFIED CODE COMPLIANT RESPONSE TO REQUEST NO. 36 AS NARROWED BY DEFENDANT, INCLUDING A REPRESENTATION A REPRESENTATION THAT SHE HAS CONDUCTED A THOROUGH AND DILIGENT SEARCH FOR RESPONIVE DOCUMENTS ON ALL SOCIAL MEDIA PLATFORMS UTILIZED BY HER SINCE JANUARY 1, 2019 TO THE PRESENT AND COPIES OF ALL RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS
(3) DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL A FURTHER RESPONSE TO REQUEST NO. 47 IS DENIED. DEFENDANT CAN OBTAIN THE RESPONSE IT SEEKS BY A MORE ARTFULLY WORDED REQUEST.
(4) THE COURT WILL IMPOSE NO MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST EITHER PARTY

Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
